title: AdTypeGate
description: Deterministic per-ad quality gate. Looks up the routed ad-type adapter (getAdType) and checks its `requires` against the ad's analyses; each unmet requirement raises the adapter's corresponding `gates` flag. No LLM. This is where the ad-type classification CHANGES behavior — closing the adapter seam: classification → routed adapter → gate flags an ad that does not deliver what its type implies (e.g. an informational ad with no extractable claim).
